title: Weightlifting
description: Weightlifting Workout

title: 10 Rep Max Deadlift
description:
Time: 0:00–1:30
Task: 10 Rep Max
Score: Total Load
Athletes must load their own bar before the heat starts.
At the call of "Go," athletes have 90 seconds to complete 10 deadlifts.
Rep criteria:
A rep is given when an athlete is standing tall, with hips and knees fully extended and shoulders behind the bar.
A sumo stance is not permitted. Hands must be outside of the feet/legs.
All 10 reps must be completed within the 90-second window. Any reps not completed before time ends will not count, even if the bar has left the floor.
Athletes may not touch-and-go reps.
Athletes may remove their hands from the bar between reps.
Athletes do not need to control the lowering of the bar.
Additional Rules:
No warm-up reps may be performed on the platform. All warm-up reps must be completed in the designated warm-up area.
Failure to complete all 10 successful reps within 90 seconds will result in an adjusted score based on reps completed. Weight X reps completed / 10 = score
Failure to lift 100kg for males and 50kg for females will also result in a DNF.
Equipment Rules:
 Belts (non-stretch, ≤13cm wide, ≤1.3cm thick) – Permitted
Weightlifting shoes – Permitted
Wrist wraps – Permitted
Chalk – Permitted
Knee sleeves (≤7mm) – Permitted
Knee wraps – Not permitted
Hand/finger tape - Not permitted
Elbow sleeves - Not permitted

title: Weighted Strict Dips Men 20kg, Women 10kg
description:
Time: 5:00–8:00
Task: Max Reps
Score: Total Reps

Athletes must be wearing the weight belt before 5:00.
The belt must wear the belt correctly with the plate between the legs.
Athletes will have 3 minutes to complete as many strict dips as possible.

Rep Criteria:

Each rep starts at the top of the dip, shoulders above wrists, arms fully extended.
Athletes must lower their shoulders below the elbow at the bottom.
Return to the full lock for the rep to count.
The weight must remain between the athletes legs, and must not swing.
No kipping, swinging, or momentum allowed.
Failure to complete 7 reps for males and 2 reps for females will result in a DNF score.

Equipment Rules:

 Belts (non-stretch, ≤13cm wide, ≤1.3cm thick) – Permitted
Weightlifting shoes – Permitted
Wrist wraps – Permitted
Chalk – Permitted
Knee sleeves (≤7mm) – Permitted
Knee wraps – Not permitted
Hand/finger tape - Not permitted
Elbow sleeves - Not permitted

title: 1000M Shuttle Run
description:
Task: 20 x 50m Shuttle Runs (1000m total)
Time Cap: 5 minutes

Athletes will start behind the line.
At the call of "Go," athletes will complete 20 x 50m shuttle runs completing 1,000m.
Additional Rules:

Athletes must run around the column at one end without touching it.
Athletes must ensure one foot touches the line at the opposite end.
Athletes must stay in their lane at all times.
Failure to complete 1,000m will result in a DNF and no score will be awarded for this event.
Double points will be awarded for this event for all athletes that qualify for day 2, the additional points will carry over into day 2 only.

For time

In a 3 min window:

20 box jump over

15 clean and jerk @ Weight 1

 

*If completed before 3:00, add 3:00 and complete:

 

20 box jump over

14 clean and jerk @ weight 2

 

*if completed before 6:00, add 3:00 and complete:

 

20 box jump over

13 clean and jerk @ weight 3

 

*if completed before 9:00, add 3:00 and complete:

 

20 box jump over

12 clean and jerk @ weight 4

 

Time cap: 12 minutes

 

Immediately following 26.1,

athletes will have until the the 20:00 mark to establish:

 

1 rep max clean and jerk

Immediately following 26.1,

athletes will have until the the 20:00 mark to establish:

 

1 rep max clean and jerk

For time

64 chest to bar pull-up

32 dumbbell thruster

16 wall walk
